knowledge.summary: Alarm judgement reads raw metrics, not 1-minute aggregates - accuracy over storage cost
Audit diff logic had before/after swapped — iterating the wrong doc and putting the wrong value into changedPrev corrupted the audit trail silently
Notification configs with `enable=false` are still loaded into the cache manager rather than skipped, so toggling enable on/off doesn't require a cache reload
Globally exclude commons-logging, log4j, and slf4j-log4j12 in Gradle so SLF4J+Logback is the only logging backend on the classpath
Queries support both configIds (policy scope) and resourceId (agent scope); filter routes to different Mongo match fields
Docker Engine 29.x raises the minimum client API to 1.44, breaking older Traefik versions that pin an older API
davidmc24 avro-gradle-plugin config — createSetters=false + fieldVisibility=PRIVATE enforces immutable generated event schemas
MongoDB GridFS uploads can silently drop file bytes if the bucket/db selection or stream flush is wrong - always verify metadata size equals input size
A history/reporting view or materialized collection created with a year-bounded clause silently stops returning rows when the calendar year rolls over
Jackson must be pinned via Gradle resolutionStrategy across all com.fasterxml.jackson.* groups to avoid NoSuchMethodError from transitive version drift
Single exclusion list drives Jacoco + Sonar + test excludes; generated/boilerplate code never counts toward coverage
Gradle `jar` task is disabled so only `bootJar` produces an artifact — CI/Docker consumers never receive an ambiguous plain JAR
Java 17 → 21 + Spring Boot 3.5.x upgrade rationale and required Gradle/JVM flag adjustments
When the template engine XML-escapes values but the downstream channel is raw SQL / plain text, the escaped `& < >` leaks into stored data
Raw alarm path uses a 1-hour-retention Kafka topic and a dedicated non-metric thread pool - isolates alarm latency from batch ingest
Wrap Avro/JSON deserializers in ErrorHandlingDeserializer so a single bad record doesn't poison the consumer and crash-loop the container
Latest-availability collection can lose data when upstream source is stale but not actually missing
LIVE charts accept normalizeTimestamp + normalizeIntervalMs to align per-agent millisecond offsets into a single x-axis
LIVE mode reads raw by default, but equalizer/multi-resource/TopN charts still aggregate raw at query time
When enumerating tenant databases in a shared MongoDB cluster, filter out admin/config/local plus third-party DBs (yorkie-meta, migration) to avoid touching shared state
MongoDB clients must pass directConnection=true when connecting to a single-node replSet, otherwise they hang on primary discovery
Cross-node Docker Swarm persistence via a single NFS share mounted at the same host path on every swarm node
Exactly one default message template may exist per notification type; creating a second default is rejected, but editing the existing default is allowed
Vendor engines (OZ Report, Crystal, Jasper-Pro) often hard-code license file search paths - pin the path in the image and document it, or you will ship it broken repeatedly
Period.Mode names encode unit and multiplier (MIN_15, MONTH_2); monthly modes densify at 24h, not monthly
Editing common collection policy can silently drop individual saveRaw/interval settings if not re-applied
Don't bind-mount i18n/exception/menu resource files into Spring Boot containers; let the jar ship its own defaults
The `system_notification` config (SMTP/SMS credentials) is intentionally shared between 2FA and password-find flows rather than duplicated per flow
Report-generation services should raise Tomcat connection/read timeout to ~1 hour because export of large OZ/Jasper reports is genuinely long-running
TopN Mongo pipeline using $unwind+$match explodes documents; push predicate into $filter first
In report immediate-generation, the topResource flag decides whether to query by resource-id (fast path) or the full conf-id set (slow path)
Traefik 2.11 silently drops idle backend connections without an explicit idleTimeout on the entrypoint/serversTransport
UDP collectors behind Traefik/containers must raise SO_RCVBUF well above the 8KB default or drop packets under burst load
vLLM serving chose fp8_e4m3 KV cache + prefix caching + MTP speculative decoding for Qwen3.5 throughput
Kafka Sticky Partitioner batches key=null messages into one partition — explains dev vs prod distribution gap
@InjectMocks picks wrong mock for same raw-type generic fields due to type erasure — flaky test root cause
Spring Data Page is immutable — Page.map() returns a new instance; forgetting to reassign silently loses the mapping
@Value on static fields causes init-order and visibility races — always inject into instance fields
SimpleDateFormat mutates Calendar state and corrupts under concurrency — use java.time.DateTimeFormatter
org.apache.catalina.util.URLEncoder is Tomcat internal — use java.net.URLEncoder or Spring UriUtils
@Testcontainers clashes with @SpringBootTest context caching — use static start() + @DynamicPropertySource
Single DataAvro{jsonData,jsonDataClass} wrapper avoids per-event Avro schema proliferation (TCM pattern)
Service-level allowCredentials+allowedOriginPatterns(*) kept because edge proxy (Traefik/Istio) enforces CORS
Yorkie holds live canvas state; the team server holds metadata (projects, assets, datasources) — never mix
Widgets are snapshots of a group at save time; later edits to the source group do not propagate
PublishedViewPage renders a frozen deploy snapshot; RealTimeViewPage renders the live editable dashboard
pushLocalChangesIntoRemote and its action-mapping helpers were removed; mutate Yorkie via doc.update directly
Global Jest coverage threshold is 80% on branches, functions, lines, and statements
UI build is pinned to Node 24.6.0 + npm 11.5.1 to match the Jenkins build environment
.spec.ts files are excluded from the Jest runner in this project — only .test.ts is discovered
"`dataSource` / `dataSourceFilter` in the codebase actually mean data-pipeline-select and data-pipeline-filter — not datasource"
Konva node coordinates can be center-based; when converting to top-left boxes subtract half width/height
MongoDB datasource connectionString requires directConnection=true in this deployment
MySQL/MariaDB SQL digest hashes fit in an unsigned 32-bit range but arrive as signed Java int — negatives are legal and must not be dropped
Spring Data MongoDB coerces 24-char-hex @Id String values to ObjectId unless @Field(targetType = FieldType.STRING) is set
Session history rows must omit sqlHash and queryTime when SQL text is missing, else they orphan in downstream joins
Do not put a unique index on sqlHash for SQL Server text-info collection — duplicates are legitimate
Collection scheduling decouples Kafka ingress from per-DBMS handlers via four typed BlockingQueues
MySQL/MariaDB metric availability depends on per-instance Performance Schema state; detect at runtime, don't assume
Unknown target RDBMS versions fall back to a documented default bucket rather than erroring, keeping collection alive
